title: Implement Campaign Sharing API
description: Implement the endpoints for generating a unique read-only share link for a campaign, and for retrieving the read-only campaign data using that link.
ai_instructions: One endpoint, protected by auth middleware, should generate and save a unique token for a campaign. A second, public endpoint should accept that token and return a stripped-down, read-only version of the campaign data.
execution_steps: Add tests to 'tests/campaign.test.ts' for the share link generation and read-only view endpoints.
Test that the generation endpoint is protected, and the public endpoint is accessible.
Run tests to see them fail.
Implement the logic for token generation and retrieving read-only data.
Run tests to verify the implementation.
Add '@trace TASK-013' to all modified files.
definition_of_done: A unique share token can be generated for a campaign via a protected endpoint.
A public endpoint allows read-only access to campaign data using a valid token.
The read-only data does not contain sensitive or GM-only information.
All tests for the campaign sharing feature pass.
